parameters.content:
## 📡 RoleRadar — Phase 3 · Generate Docs

For strong matches, generates an ATS-tuned **CV**, **cover letter**, **SWOT** and **interview study guide** — one Drive folder per application.

**In:** `Shortlist`  •  **Out:** Drive folders + `Jobs` (status = `Docs Generated`)
**Models:** `Set Job ID` → `CV_MODEL` / `CL_MODEL` / `SWOT_MODEL` / `STUDY_MODEL`

— github.com/damran/role-radar

values.name: FULL_CV_CONTEXT
values.stringValue:
Name: Alex Mercer
Current Title: Senior Security Engineer / Detection & Response Lead
Location: Berlin, Germany
Languages: English (Fluent), German (B1/B2)
Experience: 12+ years in Cybersecurity, SOC, and Detection Engineering

[EXECUTIVE SUMMARY]
Senior cybersecurity engineer with 12+ years building and scaling SOCs across cloud and enterprise environments. Track record deploying multi-cloud SOC infrastructure (AWS, Azure, GCP), tuning SIEM pipelines, and reducing response times. Expert in Detection-as-Code using Terraform and CI/CD pipelines.

[CORE COMPETENCIES]
- Security Operations: Multi-cloud SOC, Detection Engineering, Incident Response, Threat Hunting, Purple Teaming
- Cloud & Automation: AWS, GCP, Azure, Detection-as-Code, Terraform, GitHub CI/CD, Python, Bash
- SIEM & EDR: Sumo Logic, Splunk, SentinelOne, ELK Stack
- Network & AppSec: Cloudflare WAF, F5 BigIP ASM/APM, Checkpoint Firewalls, Cisco ISE
- PKI & Email Security: AD PKI infrastructure, DMARC/DKIM/SPF policies
- Threat Intelligence: MISP integration, DNS Firewall, open-source threat feeds

[PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE]
1. Nimbus Retail GmbH | Berlin | Senior Security Engineer (2021 - Present)
- Built the company's first multi-cloud SOC with centralized SIEM (Sumo Logic) across AWS, Azure, GCP
- Authored 150+ custom detection rules; integrated alerting via Slack/Jira/PagerDuty
- Championed Detection-as-Code (Terraform + GitHub CI/CD), reducing deployment errors by ~85%
- Optimized SIEM ingestion, reducing cost by ~20% while improving coverage
- Hardened applications via Cloudflare WAF tuning and SentinelOne EDR optimization

2. Helios Defense Systems | Remote/EU | Lead Security Engineer (2013 - 2021)
- Secured mission-critical multi-tier networks to strict compliance standards
- Architected F5 BigIP ASM (WAF), Checkpoint Firewalls, Cisco ISE for NAC
- Deployed Network Security Monitoring with Security Onion, Zeek
- Set up AD PKI infrastructure
- Stood up MISP-based threat intelligence
- Created DMARC/DKIM/SPF policies that significantly reduced phishing

[CERTIFICATIONS]
- AWS Certified Solutions Architect - Associate
- AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner
- HashiCorp Terraform Associate
- Certified Ethical Hacker (CEH)

[EDUCATION]
B.Sc. Computer Engineering

values.name: SKILLS
values.stringValue:
Security Operations: Multi-cloud SOC management, Detection Engineering, Incident Response, Threat Hunting, Purple Teaming
Cloud & Automation: AWS, Azure, GCP, Detection-as-Code, Terraform, GitHub Actions (CI/CD), Python, Bash
SIEM & EDR: Sumo Logic, Splunk, SentinelOne, ELK Stack
Network & AppSec: Cloudflare WAF, F5 BigIP ASM/APM, Checkpoint Firewalls, Cisco ISE (NAC), IDS/IPS (Zeek, Suricata)
Identity & Email Security: Active Directory PKI, DMARC, DKIM, SPF
Threat Intelligence: MISP, DNS Firewall, open-source threat feeds
Certifications: AWS Solutions Architect Associate, AWS Cloud Practitioner, HashiCorp Terraform Associate, CEH
Soft skills: cross-team leadership, mentoring, incident command, technical writing
